name: Domain Controller Authentication Modification - Skeleton Key Attack
description: Detects Skeleton Key attacks by monitoring for Mimikatz misc::skeleton execution, unsigned DLL injection into lsass.exe on DCs, and LSASS memory patching for authentication bypass.
query: any where (process.args : ("*misc::skeleton*", "*misc::memssp*") or (event.category == "library" and process.name == "lsass.exe" and dll.code_signature.exists == false))
